video_title: Satisfying Process of Mass Producing Candles. Korean Candle Factory

windows.old_description: Molten wax channels in the candle factory.
windows.embed_text_v2: Bulk pours molten paraffin wax into cylindrical pillar molds with centered wicks in an industrial Korean candle factory cooling rack; gloved worker levels surface with metal scoop, large white pillar candles set and cool.
windows.summary_v2: Industrial Korean candle factory bulk-pouring molten paraffin wax into cylindrical pillar molds with centered wicks, with a gloved worker leveling the wax.

tags_v2.action: bulk pour and cool pillar candles

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down view inside a Korean candle factory: rows of large white pillar candles laid in a metal cooling jig with wicks; a gloved worker's hand pours/scrapes molten wax into a mold using a metal scoop. 'Factory Monster' watermark in lower-right.
Same scene; gloved hand continues working a wax pillar in its cradle; rows of finished pillars to the right, the watermark still visible.
Gloved hand smooths or fills wax around a pillar with the scoop tool; rows of formed pillar candles in their metal jigs.
Cut to a downward look into open cylindrical molds embedded in a wax-flooded jig; wicks suspended down the centers, molten wax flowing across the surface; watermark in corner.
Same molds being filled; pale wax flowing/cooling around the centered wicks of pillars setting in cylindrical cavities.
Close shot of liquid wax pooling around several mold openings with suspended wicks; setting/cooling process.
Wider angle showing the cooling rack with finished white pillars on left and the cavities being topped up with wax via a black filling hose at right.
Continued shot of the bulk-pillar mold rack: white pillars cooling, wax flowing from hose around wicks, 'Factory Monster' watermark.

windows.embed_text: a machine that is making white paper | a machine that is making ice | a row of white plastic bottles filled with ice | a row of white candles in a factory
windows.old_description: Demoulded white pillar candles on the conveyor.
windows.embed_text_v2: industrial candle factory demoulding rows of large white cylindrical pillar candles from a wicked metal mould bed, water cooling channels, brass mould cavities, gloved worker, wax flakes
windows.summary_v2: In a candle factory, rows of large white pillar candles are cooled in a wicked metal mould bed and lifted from the brass cavities.

seconds_v2.desc: Industrial candle factory: long rows of large white cylindrical pillar candles sitting in a metal moulding bed, wicks strung above; a gloved hand reaches in at right.
Same rows of freshly formed white pillar candles on the moulding rack, gloved hand working a hose along the wick lines.
Many white industrial pillar candles lined up in the mould bed with strung wicks, gloved worker tending the row.
Closer view down a water-cooling channel running between two rows of white pillar candles in the metal mould.
Water bubbles and flows through the central cooling trough between the rows of cooling white candles.
Continued shot of cooling water channel separating banks of white pillar candles in the mould.
Tight overhead view of brass mould cavities with wicks threaded through, white candles being drawn up and wax flakes scattered around.
Close-up of the wicked brass mould holes as the finished white pillar candles are lifted out, loose wax chips on the wet metal surface.

a machine that is making yellow candles

windows.embed_text: a factory with white plastic sheets and a conveyor | a line of white plastic sheets in a factory | a convey convey with white plastic sheets | a convey convey with a convey belt and convey belt | a machine that is making yellow candles | a machine that is making candles
windows.old_description: Rows of candles cooling in the moulds on the conveyor.
windows.embed_text_v2: candle factory rows of large white and bright yellow cylindrical pillar candles set in wicked metal mould cavities, threaded wicks, molten yellow wax, brass mould holes, production line
windows.summary_v2: In a candle factory, rows of white and then bright yellow cylindrical pillar candles sit cooling in wicked metal mould beds.

seconds_v2.desc: Candle factory: rows of large white cylindrical pillar candles seated in a wicked metal mould bed, wick threads running up between them.
Angled view down the rows of white pillar candles in the moulding rack, strung wicks and brass cavity bases visible.
Many white industrial pillar candles lined up diagonally in the mould bed with threaded wicks.
Continued shot of the banks of white pillar candles cooling in the wicked metal mould.
Cut to rows of bright yellow cylindrical pillar candles set in their mould cavities, wicks standing up, molten yellow wax pooled around the bases.
Closer view of the glossy yellow pillar candles in the moulding rack with wicks and brass cavity holes.
Rows of yellow pillar candles in the mould bed, wick threads upright over the cavity bases.
Tight shot of the bright yellow pillar candles lined up in the wicked metal moulds on the factory line.

windows.old_description: Machine finishing the candles (stamping Korean text, cutting, rolling).
windows.embed_text_v2: Shrink-wraps printed-label white pillar candles through stainless guides on a Korean candle factory line; transparent plastic film encloses each candle, chain-drive packaging machinery, worker visible behind yellow crates.
windows.summary_v2: Korean candle factory shrink-wrapping line: labelled white pillar candles travel through stainless guides while transparent shrink-film is sealed around them.

tags_v2.setting: industrial Korean candle factory packaging line
tags_v2.on_screen_text: Factory Monster (channel watermark); Korean characters on candle labels

seconds_v2.desc: Factory shrink-wrap station: a finished white pillar candle with a printed red Korean character label sits on stainless guides, being fed under transparent shrink-film; 'Factory Monster' watermark bottom-right.
Same pillar slides through the stainless funnel guides with shrink-film loosely wrapped around it; printed Korean label faces up.
Closer view of the same pillar candle moving down the line, the label visible at the candle tip, shrink wrap encircling it.
Next pillar enters the shrink-wrap funnel; bare white candle entering stainless guides; chain-drive machinery and yellow factory crates beyond.
The pillar continues forward through the shrink-wrap guides; red Korean label re-appears on its surface as it advances.
Another candle with a stamped Korean label travels through the wrap apparatus; metal guides and chain mechanism in frame.
Pillar candle wrapped in clear plastic film slides further; in the background a worker in dark clothes is partly visible behind yellow crates near a spray bottle.
The wrapped pillar reaches the end of the guides; in the back, the worker continues handling product behind the factory line.

windows.old_description: Machine finishing the candles (stamping Korean text, cutting, rolling).
windows.embed_text_v2: candle factory packaging a finished white pillar candle, wrapping it in clear plastic shrink film with printed Korean label, black rubber sealing rollers, conveyor belt, finishing stage
windows.summary_v2: A finished white pillar candle is shrink-wrapped in clear labelled film and sealed by rollers on a factory packaging line.

seconds_v2.desc: Candle factory packaging close-up: a white pillar candle bearing a printed Korean label slides along a conveyor toward wrapping machinery, a black roller at left.
Tight view of the white candle sheathed in clear plastic film with a printed warning label, moving past a guide blade.
The plastic-wrapped white pillar candle with its label advances; the rounded candle end visible inside the clear film.
Close-up of the shrink-wrapped white candle and its Korean printed label travelling along the line.
The wrapped candle reaches a sealing station with black rubber rollers that press and seal the clear film over the candle on the belt.
Black rubber wheels of the wrapping machine spin against the conveyor as the labelled candle is sealed in plastic.
The white plastic-wrapped pillar candle passes beneath the rubber sealing rollers on the textured conveyor belt.
Continued shot of the labelled white candle being roller-sealed in clear film on the packaging conveyor.

windows.old_description: Machine finishing the candles (stamping Korean text, cutting, rolling).
windows.embed_text_v2: candle factory flow-wrap machine sealing finished white pillar candles in clear plastic film, twisting and crimping the film ends, printed Korean labels, metal tooling, packaging finishing stage
windows.summary_v2: White pillar candles with printed labels run through a flow-wrap machine that seals and crimps clear plastic film around them in the factory.

seconds_v2.desc: Inside the flow-wrap machine: a white pillar candle with a printed Korean label moves under metal tooling as clear plastic film is drawn around it.
Close-up of the labelled white candle entering a black sealing block, plastic film gathering at its end.
The plastic-wrapped white candle with its printed label passes through the wrapping mechanism on the line.
Labelled white pillar candle sheathed in clear film advancing past the machine's rollers and guides.
Blurred motion of the wrapped candle and film moving through the sealing/crimping section of the machine.
Close view of the clear-wrapped white candle, its printed Korean warning label clearly visible through the film.
The wrapped white candle exits with its plastic film twisted and crimped closed at the end, label showing red text.
Final close-up of the finished candle sealed in clear plastic with twisted film ends and printed label, dropping off the wrapping line.
